stimulus:
The following text is adapted from a 1908 novel. The narrator is a young college student writing letters describing her weekly experiences.

[The college is] putting together the Freshman swim team and there's just a chance that I shall make it. I'm small, of course, but I'm strong and quick in the water. While the others are still finding their breath on the wall, I can push off and reach the far end before they're halfway there.
stem: Which choice best states the main purpose of the text?

answerOptions.content: To explain why the narrator thinks she might make the swim team
To provide details of how to swim
To state how players will be chosen for the swim team

rationale:
Choice A is the best answer. The narrator says "there's just a chance that I shall make it" and explains why—she's strong, quick, and faster than other swimmers off the wall.

Choice B is incorrect. The text doesn't describe how to swim in general. Choice C is incorrect. No other sports are mentioned. Choice D is incorrect. No selection process is described.
